domains.label: Indian SMB finance
domains.description: GSTIN, PAN, HSN, IFSC, GL accounts and adjacent Indian finance fields.

domains.label: Generic finance
domains.description: Amount, currency, dates, identifiers shared across finance domains.

domains.label: Generic logs
domains.description: Log levels, services, endpoints, latency, HTTP status, IDs.

domains.label: Product analytics
domains.description: Event-stream columns from Mixpanel / Amplitude / PostHog exports: event names, user/session IDs, properties, UTM attribution.

domains.label: Geography and location
domains.description: Latitude/longitude, city, state/region, district, postal code, address.

domains.label: Marketplace and listings
domains.description: Listing/host IDs, room type, availability, reviews, minimum stay — Airbnb-style short-let and marketplace exports.

domains.label: Public sample datasets
domains.description: Outcome/demographic roles from common teaching datasets (Titanic): survival, passenger class, sex, age, fare, embarkation.

domains.label: Retail and transactions
domains.description: Order/invoice IDs, SKU/product codes, quantity, customer IDs — retail & e-commerce transaction exports.

domains.label: Media and content
domains.description: Titles, credits (director/cast), content rating, genre, release year, media type — catalog / streaming exports.

domains.label: HR and people
domains.description: Employee ID, job title, department, compensation, and tenure — HRIS / people-analytics exports (e.g. IBM HR Attrition).

domains.label: Sensitive data (PII / secrets)
domains.description: Credentials + sensitive identifiers (API keys, tokens, private keys, AWS keys, credit cards, SSN, passport, national ID, DOB, MAC, crypto wallets) — from Purview/GCP/Presidio detector families. Drives sensitivity badges + anonymize-sink defaults (secret→redact, pii→hash, financial→bucket).

domains.label: Real estate
domains.description: Property type, bedrooms/bathrooms, square footage and sale price — real-estate listing and transaction exports.

domains.label: Education
domains.description: Student IDs, grade level, course, score and completion status — school / LMS / assessment exports.

domains.label: Healthcare and clinical
domains.description: Patient / encounter IDs, diagnosis codes, length of stay and claim amounts — clinical, claims and EHR exports. Sensitivity-marked (secret/financial).

domains.label: Public sector and demographics
domains.description: Population, households, median income, unemployment rate and age bands — census / civic / open-data aggregates.

domains.label: Scientific and measurements
domains.description: Sensor IDs, temperature, humidity, pressure and measurement units — IoT / environmental / lab sensor exports.

domains.label: Risk, fraud and security
domains.description: Fraud flags, risk scores, authorization results, device IDs and card-last-4 — fraud / payments-risk / security exports. Sensitivity-marked.
